instructions.summary: Submit VerdeDesk to free startup directories that provide dofollow backlinks and SEO value
instructions.detail: Researched 15+ directories. The following accept free submissions via web form and provide meaningful backlinks. Most require a quick account creation + product listing form. Total time: ~20 min for all 5.
instructions.exact_action:
Submit to these 5 free directories (each takes 2-4 min):

1. OpenHunts (openhunts.com) — free, dofollow backlink DR 50, open alt to Product Hunt
2. SaasHunt (saashunt.com) — free, dofollow backlink DR 48, SaaS-focused
3. Resource.FYI (resource.fyi) — free, near-instant approval, no account needed
4. Side Projectors (sideprojectors.com) — free, for bootstrapped startups
5. Pitchwall (pitchwall.co) — free product submission

For each, use:
- Name: VerdeDesk
- URL: https://verdedesk.vercel.app
- Tagline: Issue green receipts, track income, stay tax-compliant — in plain English
- Description: VerdeDesk is a SaaS for English-speaking freelancers in Portugal. It wraps the confusing Portal das Financas workflow with a clean English interface — making recibos verdes, IRS declarations, and quarterly payments simple.
- Category: Finance / Tax / SaaS
instructions.unblocks: Backlinks from directories improve domain authority and help Google discover the site even without GSC
